<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Processor; use Predis\Command\CommandInterface; /** * A command processor processes Redis commands before they are sent to Redis. */ interface ProcessorInterface { /** * Processes the given Redis command. * * @param CommandInterface $command Command instance. */ public function process(CommandInterface $command); }
